query: SELECT id, dealId, whatsNext FROM snapshots LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kmzwkq9EWMaqpy.root --database PHTFs288hUf3yaW9yWMkJw --execute SELECT id, dealId, whatsNext FROM snapshots LIMIT 10;

rows.whatsNext: Send benchmark comparison vs competitor. Schedule security review with engineering team.

Send product overview deck. Schedule technical demo.
Expedite legal review. Prepare final contract draft.
Prepare pricing proposal. Get legal team involved.
Identify new champion. Request intro to David replacement.
Reassess deal viability. Consider reaching out to different stakeholder.
Schedule follow-up with CTO. Send ROI calculator.
